How it works The 3D process For partners Our work About Tell us about your business

Most marketing dies between the strategy and the build. Ours cannot.

The 3D Process connects diagnosis to strategy to launched work in one engine, with a human gate between every phase.

Tell us about your business

Why work gets stuck.

Agencies produce strategy decks that never become assets. Tools produce assets that never had a strategy. The gap between thinking and shipping is where budgets die.

Maxxim closes that gap structurally. It is the agency-in-a-box: the same engine that writes the strategy writes the briefs, and the same engine that writes the briefs builds the work. Nothing is lost in translation because nothing is handed between vendors.

Speed and judgement, together.

AI runs the repeatable 80 percent: research synthesis, drafting, production, variants. That is how strategy and a launched website arrive in days, not months.

A named human partner owns the 20 percent that matters. Inside the engine, the specialists make the method concrete: Max on words and strategy, Sal on design, Pip on social. They are the method, not the hero. The accountable human is always your partner.

Discover

We diagnose the market, customer, offer and current constraints so the strategy is grounded in evidence.

  • Audience and market: Audience Teardown, Customer Segments, Customer Pain Points and 2 more
  • Category and competitors: Competitor Analysis, Category Positioning, Market Gaps and 1 more
  • Offer and commercial diagnosis: Offer Worksheet, Product and Service Review, Pricing and Packaging Notes and 2 more
  • Discovery output: Success Definition, Objectives and Key Results, Discovery Summary and 2 more
CP1
Discovery Summary.

You review the diagnosis, the priority problems and the recommended moves. Nothing proceeds until you approve it.

You provide

Your story, your numbers and honest answers. A kick-off conversation and access to what already exists.

You review and own

The Discovery Summary at CP1: the diagnosis, the priority problems and the recommended moves.

Design

We turn the discovery into strategy, messaging, brand direction, plans and briefs that can be built from.

  • Business and growth strategy: Business Plan, Strategic Priorities, Growth Roadmap and 1 more
  • Customer and journey strategy: Customer Profile, Customer Journey, Messaging by Stage and 1 more
  • Brand and messaging: Brand Strategy, Positioning, Messaging and Offer Architecture and 3 more
  • Website and digital strategy: Website Strategy, Website Brief, Sitemap and 2 more
  • Sales and marketing plan: Marketing Plan, Social Strategy, Content Strategy and 9 more
  • Briefing documents: Design Brief, Website Brief, Photo and Video Brief and 6 more
CP2
Strategy Summary.

You review the strategy, the messaging and every brief before anything is produced. Approved direction becomes the build spec.

You provide

Reactions and decisions. You tell us what is right, what is off and what matters most.

You review and own

The Strategy Summary at CP2: strategy, messaging, brand direction and every brief, before anything is produced.

Deploy

We launch the approved work, manage the activity, report on performance and improve what is working.

  • Production and delivery: Website Build and Updates, Landing Pages, Creative Assets and 6 more
  • In-market activation: Campaign Launch, Social Content Rollout, Paid Media Launch and 6 more
  • Reporting and optimisation: Reporting Dashboard, Monthly Report, Campaign Performance Review and 5 more
  • Deploy output: Live Asset Links, Reporting Pack, Optimisation Backlog and 2 more
CP3
IMC Summary.

You approve the integrated launch plan. From here the work goes live, gets measured and gets better.

You provide

Final approvals and the go decision. After launch, the conversation continues through reporting.

You review and own

The integrated launch plan at CP3, then live assets, monthly reporting and the optimisation backlog.

After launch, the system learns.

Once the system is live, Deploy feeds back into Discover. Performance, client intelligence and proof sharpen the next cycle, so the strategy, website, content, campaigns and CRM keep getting better instead of going stale.

Reporting is not a PDF that arrives and dies. Every review produces recommendations and next actions, and the approved ones go back through the engine. That is the difference between a project and an operating system.

The checkpoint guarantee.

You do not move on until you have approved the phase. It is the opposite of the agency black box.

CP1

Discovery Summary

You review the diagnosis, the priority problems and the recommended moves. Nothing proceeds until you approve it.

Closes Discover (19 output types)

CP2

Strategy Summary

You review the strategy, the messaging and every brief before anything is produced. Approved direction becomes the build spec.

Closes Design (40 output types)

CP3

IMC Summary

You approve the integrated launch plan. From here the work goes live, gets measured and gets better.

Closes Deploy (31 output types)

Start with Discover. Decide at CP1.

No retainer to sign and no tools to learn. You see finished work before you commit to anything further.

Tell us about your business

The agency-in-a-box. The proven method, run by a human, at AI speed. Discover, Design, Deploy, then the system learns and the next cycle gets sharper.
